title: Evaluate Expression
hints: Use a stack to evaluate the Reverse Polish Notation expression.
Iterate through each token in the array:
- If the token is a number, push it onto the stack.
- If the token is an operator (+, -, *, /), pop two operands from the stack.
- Apply the operator to the operands (note: first popped is second operand, second popped is first operand).
- Push the result back onto the stack.
After processing all tokens, the stack will contain the final result.
For division, use integer division (truncate towards zero).
